---
ID: US-SLD-011
Title: Structured Import Results and Warning UX
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a slide editor user
I want parsed components and warnings presented in a structured results view
So I can validate import quality without scanning raw JSON blocks only

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Import results include a structured component list with key fields (type, x/y, width/height, source label).
- [ ] Warnings are grouped and readable, with duplicates collapsed and clear wording.
- [ ] User can copy parsed component JSON and download it as a file.
- [ ] Raw JSON view remains available as an advanced/inspect mode.
